nasb.text: When he saw that he had not prevailed against him, he touched the socket of his thigh; so the socket of Jacob’s thigh was dislocated while he wrestled with him.

esv.text: When the man saw that he did not prevail against Jacob, he touched his hip socket, and Jacob’s hip was put out of joint as he wrestled with him.

cnv.text: 那人見自己不能勝過他，就在他的大腿窩上打了一下。於是，雅各與那人摔角的時候，大腿窩脫了節。

ccb.text: 那人见胜不过雅各，就在他的大腿窝摸了一下，他大腿的关节就脱了臼。

csbs.text: 那人见自己胜不过他，就碰了他的大腿窝；于是雅各与那人摔跤的时候，大腿窝就脱了臼。
